name: AESOP
description: Developer of AI Enhanced SOlutions for Physicians (AESOP) designed to create decision support for physicians that improves healthcare quality and safety, and that makes billing related documentation easier using machine learning run on many patient visits. The company's technology offers decision support and reporting that flags inappropriate prescriptions, where the medications prescribed do not match the diagnosis, age, and gender of the patient, enabling users to enhance patient safety and medical billing accuracy.

name: Ailumia
description: Operator and developer of an IT consulting platform. The company's platform is empowered by artificial intelligence technology to guide every aspect of their retail process, providing customers and sellers with solutions and resources for potential challenges in the e-commerce industry.

name: Aora
description: Developer of home and office services applications designed to solve everyone's day-to-day life problems. The company's application provides professional services such as masonry, locksmith, technology and cleaning alternatives, appliance installation, maintenance and repairs, enabling users to get their specific service needs and requirements fulfilled.

name: Arbilex
description: Developer of predictive analytics and artificial intelligence-based platform designed to enhance decision-making by law firms. The company's software analyses international arbitration cases and uses game theory models to predict case outcomes, enabling businesses and firms to achieve desired judicial outcomes in a cost-effective manner.

name: BeautyDate
description: Operator of an online marketplace designed to offer beauty and salon services to people. The company's marketplace offers a location-based platform and mobile application that helps users to look up and schedule appointments with beauty-service providers in their cities as well as helps service providers to find their customers, enabling users to find the salon of their choice and their desired service provider within their city.

name: Belanjaparts
description: Developer of B2B e-commerce platform designed to digitize automotive workshops. The company platform offers various vehicle parts, other equipment, and lubricants at wholesale rates and quantities from various digital vendors, enabling small-medium workshops to market their products and supplies more effectively and efficiently.

name: Carousell
description: Operator of an online platform intended to simplify the process of buying and selling. The company's marketplace offers person-to-person buying and selling of products such as fashion items, home and living, mobile, and electronics among others simply by snapping a photo and posting a description of unused and secondhand clutter easily with free listings, enabling users to enjoy discounts and discover savings as well as save time and money.

name: Chaart
description: Operator of an art asset management platform intended for collecting art in a smarter way. The company's platform manages art including original paintings, prints, art toys, posters, and goods, and tracks the value of the collection, enabling users to discover art trends through collectors' authentic collections.

name: Conteller
description: Developer of a digital strategy and content platform designed to help capture content from their own customers. The company's platform offers creative support sessions and a variable payment scheme to creators based on results, visibility, traceability and compliance monitoring in matters of intellectual property and protection of personal data, enabling brands to publish briefs, capture, store and pay for authentic content directly from their clients and non-celebrity creators.

name: Cuida Mi Mascota
description: Developer of a pet care platform designed to assist people to find trusted caregivers. The company's platform connects pet owners who are looking for where to leave their pets when they travel or just for the day with pet sitters who take care of their beloved pets decreasing the stress and separation anxiety, enabling pet owners to leave their pets behind while traveling.

name: DealCart
description: DealCart is Pakistan’s super-app for groceries, consumer goods, and food delivery - delivering unbeatable prices and seamless savings via our in-app wallet.

name: Detoure
description: Developer of resale marketplace intended to source highly curated clothing from influencers and tastemakers, giving customers access to the most coveted closets in the world at thrift prices. The company helps to create a place to shop second-hand clothes directly from the style icons influencers and to provide a way for influencers to quickly capitalize on their most valuable asset their closet, enabling customers to sell their closet without spending valuable time building and maintaining a shop on other platforms.

name: Floom
description: Operator of an online floral marketplace platform intended to offer customers a wide range of flower bouquets from local artisanal florists. The company's platform allows independent florists to list their flower creations online for selling and to be used for social events according to buyers' and customers' needs, enabling customers to purchase attractive bouquets for various occasions and get them delivered to their doorstep.

name: Gloset
description: Operator of a digital e-commerce platform intended to provide second-hand clothes. The company's platform includes formal wear, party wear, sportswear, maternity clothes, shoes, and accessories, enabling customers to choose various fashion accessories at an affordable price.

name: GoPillar
description: Operator of a designer community platform intended to provide an architectural marketplace. The company's platform helps people to find professionals they can rely on to support renovation or construction projects as well as provide a single 3D render or virtual tour and designs a whole construction project from the ground up, enabling clients to access and connect with designers to make their designs come true.

name: GoWabi
description: Operator of aB2C and B2B applications to find and book health, wellness, fitness, beauty services in South-East Asia, supporting multiple payment options (Creditcard, Alipay, BNPL). The company's portal permits users to find a salon near them and book their appointment accordingly as well as offers cashback on every booking made to redeem for a cash discount, enabling users to search for top service providers of beauty and wellness all over Thailand and book online with discounts.

name: Blue Square Group Limited
description: Developer of an online trading platform designed to trade in hybrid derivatives exchange. The company's platform uses ZK-powered volition technology to separate exchange and custody functions, enabling clients to eliminate counterparty risk and take full control of the assets.

name: Hangry
description: Opeartor of a multi-brand delivery-only restaurant platform designed for consumers looking for a variety of food options. The company's platform offers a selection of virtual restaurants featuring local and international cuisines, enabling customers to order a wide range of meals through a user-friendly app and have them delivered directly to their location.

name: HelprNow
description: Operator of an online marketplace platform intended to assist customers in purchasing gifts. The company offers gifts for all kinds of occasions as well as provides customized gifts, along with recommendations of places to visit or dine for various events, enabling users to put a personal touch on gifts and purchase them at a low cost.

name: HopShop Inc.
description: HopShop turns fashion creators' Instagram posts into shoppable storefronts with AI-powered product matching and tagging.

name: HungryHub
description: Developer of a fixed-price dining application designed to offer buffet deals and share set menus. The company's platform permits diners to know food bills upfront before entering restaurants as well as assists restaurants to drive revenue through sustainable promotions, enabling restaurants to improve their customer engagement in food service.

name: Karpatia Benefits
description: The cross-border employee benefits platform with embedded marketplace that increases engagement.

name: Kiki
description: Developer of a social application designed to connect like-minded real people to enjoy nearby experiences. The company's application permits users to search for a companion and organize plans with them, enabling users to make new friends and cultivate beautiful relationships.

name: Klutch
description: Provider of automated credit card services intended to improve financial life. The company offers a consumer credit card with automation that gives people control over their finances while saving time by allowing users to set customized rules on where, when, and how they can use the card, enabling cardholders to automate their finances and customize the credit card experience through their mobile phones.

name: Lala
description: Lala helps music teachers worldwide to host lessons online.

name: Axamer
description: Ai employees for restaurants

name: miso.ai
description: Developer of a search and recommendation tool designed to solve problems related to science, technology, product research, and development. The company's tool helps to learn the researcher's interests in a responsive real-time manner and delivers them a contextual feed of the research papers, news articles, blog posts, and open-source, enabling businesses to save time and avoid blind spots that would otherwise be costly to their work.

name: Worknmates
description: Operator of a B2B marketplace for remote workers intended to provide companies with a comprehensive solution for remote and hybrid work. The company allows companies and individuals to easily find or rent out available office spaces and have the option to give their employees access to book workspaces in any part of the world on their behalf, in a buy now pay later business model, enabling clients to manage their remote workforce efficiently.

name: Parting
description: Operator of a funeral house marketplace intended to find and compare local funeral services. The company's platform has an inbuilt searchable database to find and compare local funeral homes, read reviews, view photographs, find locations, and compare prices offered by other funeral service providers, enabling users to find and book funeral homes, save money and avoid time lagging hassles during cremation.

name: Propagate
description: Developer of e-commerce incubator designed to acquire a majority stake in brands, scale, and exit to acquisition partners. The company services offer growth marketing, branding, data collection, customer service, and supply chain management, enabling businesses to elevate their brand image and increase their sales margin.

name: Invidica
description: Rerouting search engine sales into retail stores.

name: Stllr Network
description: Developer of a marketing platform designed to provide experts in performance advertisement. The company's platform provides instant access to teams, shares cross-departmental insights, monitors project timelines, and tracks goals, enabling clients with instant access to vetted marketing experts and teams for monthly projects.

name: Stylemyle
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended for contemporary luxury fashion to sell dynamically-priced overstock collections. The company's platform offers apparel like dresses, jackets, bottoms, tops, workwear, and accessories like shoes, bags, belts, hats, gloves, and jewelry, enabling luxury boutiques and designers to turn unsold inventory into sales.

name: Super Seguros
description: Operator of a multi-product insurance platform intended to emphasize the understanding, pricing, and use of insurance. The company's platform focuses on offering predefined cover amounts paid when the insurance conditions are met and simplifying such conditions in order to honor the promise to pay, enabling clients to avail of insurance with confidence and support.

name: Taskty
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to book service providers for home services. The company's marketplace allows users to connect with housekeeping personels who offer household services, such as home hygiene, furniture washing, pest control, plumbing, carpentry, electricity, air conditioning, and more, enabling customers to choose from a wide range of services as per their budget.

name: Thematic
description: Developer of a music licensing platform designed to empower music artists and content creators. The company's platform matches content creators on digital platforms with established and aspiring musicians, enabling artists to feature their music in online videos without the worry of copyright infringement.

name: The Ticket Fairy
description: Ticket Fairy is Salesforce meets Eventbrite - AI-enabled vertical SaaS for events and venues that skyrockets their revenues and accelerates their path to profitability!

name: Shelf
description: Operator of a travel management platform intended to help tourism industries book ideal clients faster, with less legwork. The company's platform offers simple tools with a modern and digital trip planning experience, enabling businesses to book clients and run their travel business effectively with simple invoicing and secure payments.

name: Trend
description:
Trend is building the world’s largest decentralized creative AI powered studio. Trend automates content creation for brands and replaces their creative agencies.

On track for generating $1m+ this year

Customers like Nestle, Huel, Unilever

Backed by Flybridge, Pharrell Williams, Techstars Ventures, founders of Twitch, Rotten Tomatoes, Kabam, Crunchyroll etc.

name: Vioo
description: Operator of a visual content creation marketplace intended to provide visual content for business projects. The company's marketplace matches professionals specialized in photography, video, virtual reality, drone, or rendering based on project requirements, enabling businesses to reduce manhours and expenses and concentrate on core functions.

name: Wifkain
description: Developer of a manufacturing-as-a-service platform designed to connect fashion businesses with fabric suppliers. The company's platform specializes in making it convenient to receive fabrics from suppliers directly, both online and offline to oversee transparent production progress, enabling users to view and order fabrics and order samples effortlessly with direct touch and sensation at all times.

name: Zehitomo
description: Operator of an online matching platform intended to match people with highly specialized professionals. The company's platform offers a space where users can connect with experts from various fields such as photography, online lessons, and many more, and receive the required service, enabling local professionals to grow their businesses and increase profitability through volume.

name: Seekster
description: Seekster is Bangkok's trusted marketplace for services ranging from Cleaning services, air-conditioning technician services, Big Cleaning, etc.

name: Plerk
description: Plerk is the only all-in-one employee benefits platform in Mexico.

name: Alba
description: Alba connects families with caregivers in Latin America and provides peace of mind in every step of the caring process. Through its platforms, Alba connects families with caregivers of their social networks, allowing parents to book caregivers just as if their best friend would have recommended it. After booking, parents receive live updates of what’s happening at home and caregivers receive 24/7 support, ensuring peace of mind in every step of the process
